title: Bridge Essay: Mind-wandering as spontaneous thought: a dynamic framework.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight.

**Mind-wandering as spontaneous thought: adynamic framework.**. Nat Rev Neurosci.. PMID: 27654862. DOI: 10.1038/nrn.2016.113. Most research on mind-wandering has characterized it as amental state with contents that are task unrelated or stimulus independent. However, the dynamics of mind-wandering - how mental states change over time - have remained largely neglected. Here, we introduce adynamic framework for understanding mind-wandering and its relationship to the recruitment of large-scale brain networks.
